rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GERALD A. DURKIN AND ELSIE J. DURKIN 2015 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For An Order To Sell The Trust Property "As-Is"
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THELMA M. THOMPSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required, as nothing has been filed to address the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 04/24/2024): 1) Please provide a copy of the settlement agreement among the family members re distribution of the real property interest removed from this estate. 2) Please provide a copy of a waiver of independent counsel signed by each beneficiary re the real property title issue. 3) The executor will be discharged on this petition if it is granted. The petition must pray for, and the proposed order must include, the executor's discharge. See Probate Code section 12251(c). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. A petition for final distribution or a second report of status must be filed at least two weeks before 1/27/25. Appearance will be required on 1/27/25 if no petition is timely filed. The next petition must include an accounting for the first two years of estate administration unless accounting is waived by all interested parties. [LRSF 14.34 A.]

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JEROME GOLDSTEIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Confirm Trust Property
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/14/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Paragraph 11 states that San Mateo is the proper venue for this petition. (2) Any person, other than a trustee or beneficiary, whose right, title, or interest would be affected by the petition must receive (or waive) personal service of notice. [Prob. C. Sect. 17203(a)(2) and CCP Sect. 413.10 et seq.] Who are Jerome Goldstein's heirs-at-law? (3) A copy of each account statement immediately preceding the trustor's date of death must be filed to confirm how title to the accounts was vested. (4) Two of the accounts at issue were not reportedly held in Jerome Goldstein's individual name: one is reported to be DBA Goldstein Properties Trust; and one is in the name of his professional corporation. Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by10/4/24. (A copy of any amendment or supplement to the petition must be served in the same manner as the petition. [CRC 7.53.] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CARLOS NELSON MONTOYA JR.
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing Status of closing the estate will be set for 8/25/2025. The personal representative must file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. C. Section 12200 (requesting additional time for estate administration) at least two weeks before that status date. Appearance will be required on 8/25/2025 if no petition has been filed.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SANH VAN LUONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/26/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take (or would have taken) shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.18 C.] Who were the parents of the niblings and when did they die? (2) Item 3f of the petition is incomplete. (3) Item 7 of the petition is incomplete regarding who the predeceased spouse's heirs are. (4) Item 8 of the petition does not appear to list the heirs of the predeceased spouse. Deadline is 8/16/24 for providing the assigned examiner courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
